name: Ayush Kumar Gupta
tagline: BTech in Computer Science · MS in Computational Linguistics
institution: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad
bio: I study how neural language models learn — probing internal representations, attention dynamics, and failure modes to understand how linguistic knowledge is acquired from indirect supervision. Alongside research, I build NLP systems end to end: information retrieval pipelines, sequence labelers, and the occasional networked shell.

current.org: IIIT Hyderabad · Supervisor: Prof. Manish Shrivastava
